summary: Short brand update from Krystle attending the Mane Event expo in Chilliwack with Cavallo Hoof Boots and Saddle Pads.
Monty Roberts testimonial endorsing the Cavallo Total Comfort System Saddle Pads, praising the gullet system, memory foam and reversible wool design.
Customer success story tracking Tippy's barefoot trim transformation over three months while using Cavallo Hoof Boots for trail riding.
Joe Camp essay on equine nutrition and laminitis risk, exploring why horses founder on the rich grasses of middle Tennessee's "Founder Valley."
Cavallo President Carole's story of part-owning racehorse Travis and using Cavallo hoof boots to challenge metal-shoe norms in horse racing.
Customer story of using Cavallo Sport Hoof Boots during the Antelope Island Bison Roundup in Utah after a horse threw its front shoes.
Brief brand update on Cavallo Hoof Boots at the American Heart Association beach ride in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina.
Product overview of Cavallo Total Comfort System Saddle Pads detailing the Tri-Density Nitrex and open-cell memory foam construction for weight distribution and shock absorption.
Joe Camp blog reflecting on learning horse groundwork basics and seeking a single congealed guide to relationship and leadership with horses.
Update testimonial on foundered mare Lilla Gumman recovering and trail riding soundly in Cavallo Simple hoof boots on all four feet.
Customer testimonial from Melodie Clark on switching her filly to Cavallo Sport Boots over winter as an alternative to shoes in Pennsylvania.
Chinese New Year greeting marking the Year of the Dragon and thanking the Cavallo team in Asia, teasing exciting plans for 2012.
